facts: Rayan Cherki's statement that the team will go to the World Cup 'pour écraser tout le monde' indicates a high level of ambition and confidence within the squad.
Coach Didier Deschamps is actively combating 'tout excès de confiance' within the team, especially after recent positive results.
Rayan Cherki is likely seen in a 'rôle de détonateur de cours de match' rather than a guaranteed starter for the upcoming World Cup in the USA.
The team lost 1-2 to Ivory Coast in a recent preparation match.
The upcoming match against Senegal (June 16, near New York) for the World Cup is classified as a high-heat risk match, which could impact performance.
